name: winyolo
description: Operate a Windows PC through WinYOLO's visible, auditable native-command control plane.

interface.longDescription: Inspect and operate Windows through a localhost control plane with native PowerShell tools, risk explanations, confirmations, and replayable receipts.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose a native Windows process or port issue.
Run this task through the WinYOLO receipt.
